step_by_step_thinking: Post-operative endocarditis typically involves bacteria from blood-borne sources following surgery. Common causes include streptococcal species due to their ability to colonize mucosal surfaces and enter bloodstream easily after trauma like surgery. Among the given options, \boxed{A} Streptococcus viridans fits best as they frequently cause such infections secondary to dental work but can occur post-surgery too.
raw_response:
Post-operative endocarditis typically involves bacteria from blood-borne sources following surgery. Common causes include streptococcal species due to their ability to colonize mucosal surfaces and enter bloodstream easily after trauma like surgery. Among the given options, \boxed{A} Streptococcus viridans fits best as they frequently cause such infections secondary to dental work but can occur post-surgery too.
\boxed{A}
